name: iron-jugulis
flavor_texts: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot.
It’s possible that Iron Jugulis, an object described in an old book, may actually be this Pokémon.
text: Iron-jugulis is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a dark and flying-type Pokémon. Abilities: quark-drive. Base stats — HP: 94, Attack: 80, Defense: 86, Sp. Atk: 122, Sp. Def: 80, Speed: 108. Evolution line: iron-jugulis. Lore: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot. It’s possible that Iron Jugulis, an object described in an old book, may actually be this Pokémon.
